description: Create a comprehensive GitHub Actions workflow named GitHub CI that runs on every push to master and tlslite-ng-0.7 branches and on pull requests. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to test multiple Python versions (2.6, 2.7, 3.3-3.9) on various environments (ubuntu-16.04, ubuntu-18.04, ubuntu-latest, centos:6), with different optional dependencies (m2crypto, pycrypto, gmpy, gmpy2, tackpy) installed. For each job, check out the repository, set up Python, install dependencies, run unit tests, connection tests, lint the code, and publish coverage to Coveralls and Codeclimate.
